blended.narrative: Copper Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.0 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 10,244 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
